title: U Cinn - NEFA Concentration
author: Patrick Tso
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.xmnfk5e

steps.title: Prepare working Color Reagent Solutions A and B
steps.instruction: Prepare working Color Reagent Solutions A and B. A. Reconstitute Color Reagent A with a portion of Solvent A and then transfer entire contents into Solvent A bottle, rinsing Color Reagent vial several times. B. Reconstitute Color Reagent B with a portion of Solvent B and then transfer entire contents into Solvent B bottle, rinsing Color Reagent vial several times.

steps.title: Locate working Standard (1mmol/L or 1 mEq/L)
steps.instruction: Locate working Standard (1mmol/L or 1 mEq/L). THIS ASSAY DOES NOT REQUIRE A SERIAL DILUTION

steps.title: Using a 96 well flat bottom...
steps.instruction: Using a 96 well flat bottom plate, into separate wells, pipette 5μL of deionized water, 1mMstandard, or sample to be assayed.

steps.title: Add 200μL of Color Reagent Solution A to all wells
steps.instruction: Add 200μL of Color Reagent Solution A to all wells.

steps.title: Mix well and Incubate plate for 5 minutes at 37°C
steps.instruction: Mix well and Incubate plate for 5 minutes at 37°C.

steps.title: Measure the absorbance of each well at 550nm (sub:660nm)
steps.instruction: Measure the absorbance of each well at 550nm (sub:660nm). This measurement (Abs1) will serve as the sample blank.

steps.title: Add 100μL of Color Reagent Solution B to all wells
steps.instruction: Add 100μL of Color Reagent Solution B to all wells.

steps.title: Mix well and Incubate plate for 5 minutes at 37°C
steps.instruction: Mix well and Incubate plate for 5 minutes at 37°C.

steps.title: Measure the absorbance of each well at 550nm (sub:660nm)
steps.instruction: Measure the absorbance of each well at 550nm (sub:660nm). This will be your Abs2 value.

steps.title: Obtain the final absorbance (Sample abs...
steps.instruction: Obtain the final absorbance (Sample abs ) by subtracting the first reading (step 5) from the second reading (step 8). *

steps.title: Plot the absorbance vs
steps.instruction: Plot the absorbance vs. concentration to construct the calibration curve. A linear calculation model should be used.

steps.title: should be multiplied by a Factor...
steps.instruction: should be multiplied by a Factor (F) in order to correct for changes in volume, as follows: F=(Sample vol + R1 vol) / (Sample vol. + R1 vol + R2 vol) For this assay: F = (5+200) / (5+200+100) = 0.67 Therefore: Sample abs = Abs2 – (Abs1 * 0.

steps.title: Specimen
steps.instruction: Specimen : Serum or Plasma. Specimen stable for 7 days at 2-8°C or 3 months at -20°C. Assay Linearity : 4.0 mEq/L Reagent Stability : 7 days at 2-8°C Stability of Final Reaction : 60 minutes
